# Bhagat's One-Stop Point

> Neighborhood general store and digital services hub in Kishanganj, Bihar, India.
> Trusted by the local community since 1999.

## What We Do

Bhagat's One-Stop Point (also known as Uma Xerox) is a neighborhood store in Kishanganj, Bihar offering:
- Fresh Sudha and Amul dairy products (milk, curd, paneer, buttermilk, butter)
- Daily grocery essentials (rice, pulses, oils, spices, household supplies)
- Bakery items and branded snacks (Haldiram's, Lay's, Britannia, Maggi)
- Stationery and school supplies
- High-speed Xerox and colour printing
- Professional passport and visa photographs
- Document lamination
- AEPS (Aadhaar-Enabled Payment System) cash withdrawal
- Home delivery via WhatsApp

## Store Information

- Location: Kishanganj, Bihar, India
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 70042 11630
- Hours: Monday–Sunday, 7 AM to 9 PM
- Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/3ugWFGWYusQPKEr9A
- Home delivery: WhatsApp order list to +91 70042 11630

- Homepage: https://bhagatsonestop.com/

- General store & household: https://bhagatsonestop.com/shop/general
- Digital services (Xerox, AEPS, Photos): https://bhagatsonestop.com/services
- About us & history: https://bhagatsonestop.com/about
- Contact & location: https://bhagatsonestop.com/contact

## Business History

Founded in 1999 as Uma Electronics (electronics repair, STD/ISD calling booth) in Kishanganj, Bihar.
Expanded to inverter assembly and battery sales around 2000.
Pivoted to digital services (Xerox, lamination, online bill payments, stationery) in 2012.
Evolved into Bhagat's One-Stop Point — a complete general store and phygital hub — from 2020 onwards.

## Brands Stocked

Dairy: Sudha, Amul
Snacks: Haldiram's, Lay's, Bingo, Kurkure, Parle
Bakery: Britannia, Parle-G, local bakery
Noodles: Maggi, Top Ramen
FMCG: Surf Excel, Dettol, Colgate, Dove, Parachute, HUL brands
Beverages: Frooti, Maaza, Thumsup, Pepsi, Red Bull
Staples: Aashirvaad, India Gate, MDH, Everest
